definition: properties characterizing reference state variables that are used throughout the list of properties

definition_ml.en: properties characterizing reference state variables that are used throughout the list of properties
definition_ml.fr: propriétés caractérisant des variables d’état de référence qui sont utilisées dans l’ensemble de la liste de propriétés
definition_ml.de: Merkmale, die Referenzzustandsgrößen kennzeichnen, die in der ganzen Merkmalleiste benutzt werden

note: Reference state variables give the reference state or reference conditions to which a state function like density or flow rates are calculated

note_ml.en: Reference state variables give the reference state or reference conditions to which a state function like density or flow rates are calculated
